prompt: Subject is the exact woman from the reference image, walking slowly through a sun-dappled alleyway near the Palace, holding a small red flag with a yellow star. She is looking down at the flag with a soft, reverent smile. The white silk of her Ao Dai catches the shards of light breaking through the tree canopy, showing micro-wrinkles and high-end fabric texture. Her skin is illuminated with dappled light, showing realistic texture and natural glow. The background is a textured yellow wall with climbing vines and vintage signage. Lighting is dappled sunlight with soft falloff. Shot with a Nikon Z8, 85mm f/1.2 lens, eye-level candid shot with creamy background bokeh.
